name: High-Performance TWPO Piston Kit
description: Engineered for maximum durability and compression, the CFG TWPO Piston Kit is the ultimate upgrade for your track-focused machine. Forged from high-strength aluminum alloy, it delivers superior heat resistance and reduced friction.

name: Carbon Ceramic Rotor Kit
description: Kit de discos de freno de carbono-cerámica de alto rendimiento para máxima frenada.

name: Twin-Scroll Turbo T4
description: Turbo de doble entrada T4 con tecnología de scroll gemelo para máxima eficiencia.

name: Iridium Spark Plugs (4-Pack)
description: Bujías de iridio de larga duración para mejor rendimiento del motor.
